overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character running along a sunny coastal beach. The character passes a fleet of large Mongol warships anchored offshore while white rocky cliffs line the right side of the beach under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with distant fleet

agents.ego_description: samurai character running along the beach toward distant ships

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water with gentle waves lapping the shore
golden sand covering the ground with visible footprints
tall white rock formations with sparse vegetation on top
distant fleet of large wooden warships with multiple masts
green pine trees scattered atop the white cliffs

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs along a wide sandy beach with the ocean on the left and white rocky cliffs ahead on the right. A fleet of Mongol ships is visible in the far distance across the water under a clear blue sky.

events.description: large Mongol warship comes into close view on the left side

agents.ego_description: running alongside the large wooden warships anchored near the shore

entered.detail: massive wooden sailing vessel with tall masts and sails anchored close to shore

segments.scene_description: A large Mongol warship dominates the left side of the frame as the character runs alongside it. The white rocky cliffs on the right grow larger and more detailed as the character approaches the headland.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach at base of white cliffs

agents.ego_description: running along the base of the white rocky cliffs

segments.scene_description: Having passed the ships, the character continues running along the coastline with the white rocky cliffs now dominating the right side. Pine trees are clearly visible atop the cliffs as the character runs at their base.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved beach with cliffs and distant fleet

events.description: character turns slightly left toward the ocean, changing the view angle

agents.ego_description: running along the beach and turning back toward the water, bringing the fleet back into view

entered.detail: distant fleet of ships visible again across the water as the character turns

segments.scene_description: The character turns slightly left toward the ocean, bringing the distant Mongol fleet back into view across the water. The white cliffs remain on the right but recede slightly as the beach curves along the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline that shifts from a wide-open beach toward the towering presence of rocky cliffs. It begins with a samurai running across a broad sandy expanse, with a distant fleet of Mongol ships anchored under a clear blue sky. As the character advances, a massive warship looms over the left side of the frame while the white rocky cliffs on the right grow larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts as the character passes the ships, moving along the base of the cliffs where pine trees become visible atop the heights. Finally, the camera turns slightly toward the ocean, bringing the distant fleet back into view as the beach curves and the cliffs begin to recede.
